nodes.name: Incoming Call Webhook
nodes.notes: Twilio/Exotel sends POST when call arrives. Contains: CallSid, From, To, CallStatus, caller number.

nodes.name: Initialize Session
nodes.notes: Creates session variables that persist across the entire call. These travel with every node.

nodes.name: Lookup Caller in CRM
nodes.notes: Check if caller exists in CRM/Google Sheets. If found, pre-populate name and preferences.

nodes.name: Fetch Business Config
nodes.notes: Loads business-specific config: name, timings, menu, pricing, offers, language preferences.

nodes.name: Merge Caller + Business Data
nodes.notes: Combines caller history and business config into a single context object for the AI.

nodes.name: Generate Time-Aware Greeting
nodes.notes: Generates a natural greeting based on time of day, caller language, and whether they're a returning customer.

nodes.name: Text-to-Speech: Greeting
nodes.notes: Converts greeting text to human-like speech using ElevenLabs multilingual model. Returns audio stream.

nodes.name: Stream Greeting Audio to Caller
nodes.notes: Returns TwiML response to Twilio that plays greeting audio and then opens a <Gather> for caller input.

nodes.name: Conversation Turn Webhook
nodes.notes: Each subsequent caller utterance hits this webhook. Twilio sends the recorded speech or DTMF input.

nodes.name: Speech-to-Text (Deepgram)
nodes.notes: Sends caller audio to Deepgram Nova-2 with multi-language detection. Returns transcript + detected language + confidence.

nodes.name: Check for Silence/Empty Input
nodes.notes: If Deepgram returns empty transcript → silence detected. Route to silence handler.

nodes.name: Handle Silence
nodes.notes: Handles silence progressively: gentle prompt → 'are you there?' → graceful end with WhatsApp fallback.

nodes.name: Detect & Lock Language
nodes.notes: Detects language from Deepgram output. Locks language after 2 turns to prevent mid-call confusion. Supports code-switching.

nodes.name: Detect Caller Emotion
nodes.notes: Rule-based emotion detection from transcript. Detects: anger, urgency, confusion, happiness, escalation requests.

nodes.name: Transfer to Human Agent
nodes.notes: Generates TwiML to warm-transfer the call to a human agent. Includes a fallback message if human is unavailable.

nodes.name: AI Conversational Brain (Claude)
nodes.notes: Core AI brain. Claude processes intent, generates response, handles multi-turn dialogue. System prompt contains full persona + business context.

nodes.name: Build AI Prompt
nodes.notes: Assembles the full AI prompt with system instructions, business context, caller data, and conversation history.

nodes.name: Parse AI Response + Extract Data
nodes.notes: Extracts the spoken response and structured data from AI output. Merges data progressively across turns.

nodes.name: Humanization Engine
nodes.notes: Makes AI responses feel human: adds fillers, SSML pauses, speed adaptation based on emotion, and natural thinking delays.

nodes.name: Text-to-Speech: Response
nodes.notes: Converts humanized response to speech. Uses ElevenLabs multilingual v2 for natural-sounding Indian English + regional languages.

nodes.name: Build TwiML Continue Response
nodes.notes: Generates TwiML that plays AI audio response, then opens recording for next caller utterance. Creates the conversation loop.

nodes.name: Send TwiML to Twilio
nodes.notes: Returns TwiML response to Twilio, which executes the voice instructions (play audio, record, etc.).

nodes.name: Save Booking to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Saves confirmed booking to Google Sheets with all collected details.

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Confirmation
nodes.notes: Sends WhatsApp booking confirmation via WATI API using pre-approved template.

nodes.name: Log Full Conversation
nodes.notes: Logs the complete conversation for analytics, training data, and continuous improvement.
